effect.name: Color Enhance
effect.description: Enhances the color contrast for vivid images
effect.author: Cynthia

parameter.name: a_base
Channel A Base
parameter.comment: Midpoint of sigmoidal curve for A channel.

parameter.name: b_base
Channel B Base
parameter.comment: Midpoint of sigmoidal curve for B channel.

parameter.name: a_slope
Channel A Slope
parameter.comment: Steepness of the sigmoidal curve for A channel.

parameter.name: b_slope
Channel B Slope
parameter.comment: Steepness of the sigmoidal curve for B channel.
